Name: FACE_EDIT_PARAM_COLOR_A_PRESET
Description: Defines an RGBA color preset used by the facial customization and character creation system.

Fields.Name: Red
Fields.Description: Red color channel intensity value for the preset.

Fields.Name: Green
Fields.Description: Green color channel intensity value for the preset.

Fields.Name: Blue
Fields.Description: Blue color channel intensity value for the preset.

Fields.Name: Alpha Value
Fields.Description: Alpha or transparency value associated with the color preset.
